title: Make Shots Less Stressful for Your Child | Childhood Vaccines | CDC
text:

Tip 
Watch the video, what you should expect when your child is vaccinated.
How to Hold Your Child During Vaccination 
Ways parents can hold their child during vaccinations. 
Vaccines When Your Child Is Sick 
It’s okay to get vaccinated, even if your child has a mild illness. 
Before, During, and After Shots 
Prepare to know what to do to support your child before, during and after your child is vaccinated. 
On This Page 
1. Do your research 
2. Ask for a sweet solution 
3. If you can, breastfeed 
4. Ask for a pain-relieving ointment or spray 
5. Be honest and calm 
6. Bring your child’s favorite things 
7. Distract your child 
8. Big kids need support too 
9. Care after the shot 
August 9, 2024

Childhood Vaccines 
Vaccines can help protect babies and children from serious, even deadly, diseases. It’s important to stay up to date on recommended vaccines.
